businessSummary.oneLiner: The leading government and enterprise AI data analytics platform, built on Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), and AIP (AI Platform)
businessSummary.description: Palantir builds AI data analytics platforms for government and enterprise customers. FY2025 revenue reached $4.48B (+60%). US commercial revenue hit $650M in Q4 (+137% YoY). The Pentagon designated Maven AI as an official program of record, and Palantir was selected to develop software for the $185B Golden Dome missile defense project. FY2026 guidance of $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%) signals accelerating growth.
howTheyMakeMoney: Enterprise AI platform (Foundry) - Corporate data integration
AIP (AI Platform) - Generative AI integration platform
AIP Bootcamps - Rapid adoption programs for customer conversion

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Extreme premium even for software. Rule of 40 score of 127% partially justifies it, but any growth slowdown risks sharp correction

keyMetrics.name: P/S (Price-to-Sales)
keyMetrics.interpretation: 3-4x the SaaS average (10-15x). Palantir's +60% growth rate is the only justification

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (FY2025)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Extraordinarily rare growth rate at this scale. Q4 reached +70% YoY

keyMetrics.name: US Commercial Revenue (Q4)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Explosive enterprise customer acquisition. Key driver of reducing government dependency

keyMetrics.name: Rule of 40
keyMetrics.interpretation: Revenue growth + profit margin = 127%. Top tier among all SaaS companies globally

keyMetrics.name: Net Dollar Retention (NDR)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Existing customers spending 39% more year-over-year. Proves high product stickiness

growthDrivers.title: Selected for $185B Golden Dome missile defense software (3/24)
growthDrivers.description: Reuters reports Palantir and Anduril were chosen to develop software for the DOD's $185B Golden Dome space-based missile defense shield, designed to intercept ballistic, cruise, and hypersonic missiles

growthDrivers.title: Rosenblatt reiterates Buy, $200 target (3/25)
growthDrivers.description: Rosenblatt Securities reaffirmed Buy with $200 target citing Golden Dome participation. Called Palantir 'the backbone of US military AI'

growthDrivers.title: Maven AI designated official program of record
growthDrivers.description: Pentagon designated Maven Smart System as an official program of record (3/20), confirming long-term, military-wide deployment and stable defense revenue

growthDrivers.title: Combat-tested in Iran conflict, thousands of strikes
growthDrivers.description: NYT/Reuters reported Pentagon used Palantir + Anthropic AI to identify Iran strike targets, reducing identification-to-execution time from hours to minutes

growthDrivers.title: FY2026 revenue guidance $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%)
growthDrivers.description: Management confident in accelerating growth with US commercial segment as the primary engine

growthDrivers.title: UK FCA 3-month Foundry trial
growthDrivers.description: UK Financial Conduct Authority adopted Palantir Foundry for a 3-month trial, signaling expansion beyond defense into government regulatory agencies

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ years of government defense AI track record, top-tier security clearances, Maven military-wide adoption, Iran combat verification, Golden Dome selection. Moats that money cannot buy

moats.description: Ontology platform deeply integrated into government/military systems. Replacement costs are prohibitively high
Highest-level security clearances and 20+ year government trust relationships. Virtually impossible for newcomers to replicate
AIP Bootcamps drive rapid customer acquisition while Ontology data models expand the ecosystem
Real-time deployment in thousands of Iran strikes. Battle data is the ultimate competitive advantage

competitors.name: Anduril Industries
competitors.detail: Co-selected for Golden Dome software. $60B valuation. Hardware-focused, complementary to Palantir

competitors.name: Snowflake / Databricks
competitors.detail: Enterprise data platform competitors but far behind in government/defense access

competitors.name: Microsoft / AWS
competitors.detail: Cloud giants entering government AI but lack Palantir's specialized Ontology depth

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI platform trailing significantly in both revenue and growth

recentNews.headline: Rosenblatt reiterates Buy, $200 target on Golden Dome involvement
recentNews.significance: Cites $185B project participation as strengthening long-term defense revenue base. Calls PLTR 'backbone of US military AI'

recentNews.headline: After-hours +1.25% on Golden Dome news, ending 4-day slide
recentNews.significance: Stock snapped 4-day losing streak on $185B missile defense project news

recentNews.headline: Reuters: Anduril, Palantir developing Golden Dome missile shield software
recentNews.significance: Selected for DOD's $185B space-based missile defense system software from hundreds of competing companies

recentNews.headline: Maven designation drives +6.78% surge
recentNews.significance: Pentagon designating Maven as program of record triggered the largest single-day gain in weeks

recentNews.headline: Palantir + Anthropic AI deployed for Iran strike targeting
recentNews.significance: Maven system integrated with Anthropic Claude for thousands of real combat strikes. Battle-proven credentials

analystOpinions.notableComment: Rosenblatt $200 Buy reaffirmed (Golden Dome), Wedbush Dan Ives $230. Golden Dome + Maven significantly strengthened the defense revenue foundation

risks.title: Extreme valuation (Forward P/E ~112x)
risks.description: +60% growth still cannot easily justify P/E 112x and P/S 49x. Good news rallies get reversed by macro repeatedly

risks.title: Ethical controversy (Iran war AI deployment)
risks.description: Reports of Palantir + Anthropic AI used in Iran strikes raise ESG concerns and regulatory risk

risks.title: Software sector-wide weakness (IGV YTD -23%)
risks.description: Software ETF (IGV) down 23% YTD. Oil $99, Nasdaq -15%. High-multiple stocks take disproportionate hits

risks.title: Insider selling pressure
risks.description: Tech sector weakness amplifies insider selling impact at P/E 112x

risks.title: Anduril competition/collaboration uncertainty
risks.description: Co-selected for Golden Dome but Anduril at $60B valuation could become a competitor in defense AI

buyReasons.title: Golden Dome $185B + Maven = maximum defense moat
buyReasons.rationale: Missile defense + military-wide AI software partner, plus Iran combat verification. Two layers of irreplaceable moat added in one week

buyReasons.title: 4-day decline snapped by Golden Dome bounce
buyReasons.rationale: +6.78% (Maven) then 4-day fall, now after-hours +1.25% (Golden Dome). Rosenblatt $200 reaffirmed. Basing process underway

buyReasons.title: US commercial revenue +137% explosive growth
buyReasons.rationale: Q4 US commercial at $650M (+137% YoY). Reducing government dependency while accelerating growth

buyReasons.title: 24% discount from 52-week high
buyReasons.rationale: $207.52 high to $158. Bullish structure intact with price above both 50-day and 200-day

overallOpinion: Palantir just landed the $185B Golden Dome missile defense software contract. Combined with Maven's program-of-record designation and Iran combat verification, the company is cementing itself as the indispensable AI partner for US defense. Rosenblatt reaffirmed Buy at $200.

The 4-day slide was broken by Golden Dome news, lifting after-hours by 1.25%. Commercial revenue at +137% and Rule of 40 at 127% show flawless execution, but P/E 112x in a market where oil is $99 and IGV is down 23% means every rally gets faded.

Above both the 50-day ($148) and 200-day ($120), maintaining bullish structure. Down 24% from 52-week high at $158. Consensus $196 (+24%). The defense moat keeps thickening, and when macro stabilizes, this is the AI stock most likely to be re-rated first.

investmentVerdict.summary: Golden Dome + Maven have maximized the defense moat, but Forward P/E 112x and strong macro headwinds mean good news keeps getting reversed. Current holders should maintain positions. Consider accumulating below $145.

sources.name: Reuters
sources.description: Golden Dome $185B missile defense software selection exclusive

threads.hook: Golden Dome + Maven: the core of US defense AI
threads.text:
$PLTR (Mar 26) $158

One week after Maven became an official military program, Palantir lands the $185B Golden Dome missile defense software contract. Space-based shield against ballistic, cruise, and hypersonic missiles. Rosenblatt reaffirmed Buy at $200.

4-day decline snapped with AH +1.25%. But P/E 112x in a market where IGV is -23% and oil is $99 means every rally gets faded. Execution is flawless, macro is the problem.

Above 50-day and 200-day, bullish structure intact. Down 24% from high. Target $196 (+24%). When macro turns, this re-rates first.

Golden Dome $185B + Maven + Iran combat. Rosenblatt $200. AH +1.25%. P/E 112x, IGV -23%. Above 50-day, 200-day. Target $196 (+24%).

witty.text:
$PLTR (Mar 26) $158

The AI that intercepts hypersonic missiles couldn't intercept a 4-day tech selloff. Golden Dome $185B, Maven, Iran combat: three defense wins in a week. After-hours: +1.25%. The market's reaction? Polite golf clap.

P/E 112x in a market where IGV is -23%. Every rally gets the macro eraser treatment. Rosenblatt says $200, the market says later.

Defense moat is ironclad. Target $196 (+24%). When the market decides to care, it'll move fast.

empathy.hook: Best news flow in years, stock won't cooperate
empathy.text:
$PLTR (Mar 26) $158

Maven, Iran combat verification, Golden Dome $185B. This is the best news flow Palantir has ever had. And the stock fell for 4 days. AH +1.25% on Golden Dome is a start, but it's frustrating.

P/E 112x and IGV -23% mean the market isn't ready to reward growth at any price. This isn't about Palantir, it's about macro.

Above both moving averages, bullish structure intact. Target $196 (+24%). The moat is proven. Patience will be rewarded.
